title: ESDC Employees  - Canada.ca
content:
News, updates, and onboarding information for Employment and Social Development (ESDC) employees.
- Employment and  Social Development Canada

## Information and services

### Privacy breach affecting current and former federal employees
If you have used BGRS or SIRVA Canada relocation services, your personal information may have been compromised. Learn about what precautionary measures are available to you.
Find ESDC job opportunities and learn why ESDC is an award-winning employer in diversity.

### Onboarding for new employees
Activities and information on internal policies, work processes and established cultural norms.

### Leave Without Pay ( LWOP ) for other reasons
A summary of ESDC employee rights and obligations regarding pension and benefits when on leave without pay for other reasons.

### Office status for ESDC employees
Updates on that status of our offices in the National Capital Region.

### Messages for employees
News, updates, and thank you messages for ESDC employees.
Jobs, rates of pay, benefits and pension plans for public servants, values and principles guiding our work, learning opportunities, workplace wellness

### Automatic cash-out of vacation and compensatory leave
Cash-out process for accumulated annual or compensatory leave

### Classification conversion
Classification information for the Program and Administrative Services ( PA ) group and the Comptrollership ( CT ) group

## Download the MyESDC mobile app
The MyESDC App provides important Government of Canada information to public servants, members of the public who may be interested in working for Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC), or anyone who is interested in knowing more about the department in general.
- Download now from the Google Play Store
- Download now from the Apple App Store
